audio_identity.overall_style: Industrial action-adventure soundtrack with Fear Factory band integration
distinctive_elements: Fear Factory songs used in soundtrack
Industrial/cyberpunk aesthetic matching Faktur city setting
'oof' death sound effect (later became iconic in Roblox)

notes.data_limitation: Wikipedia source contains minimal audio documentation. No tempo, key, chord progression, time signature, or per-area music data available.
notes.documented_audio_credits: Composers: Jesper Kyd, Joey Kuras; Sound effects by Tommy Tallarico and Joey Kuras; Fear Factory songs featured
notes.notable_sfx: The 'oof' sound used for character death became subject of legal dispute and compensation agreement regarding its later use in Roblox
